### Fix 1 Analysis (Line 212 - Button variant type change)

The rule says the `variant` prop type changed to add `'stateful'` to the union. The current code uses `variant={ButtonVariant.plain}`, and `plain` is still a valid value in the new type. The value `plain` exists in both the old and new type unions. **No code change is needed** — the existing code is already compatible with the new type.

### Fix 2 Analysis (Line 129 - DataList family: DataListItemCells requires DataListCell)

The rule `sd-cf-datalist-itemcells-req-cell` says `DataListItemCells` must contain `DataListCell`. Looking at the code:

- Line 129: `<DataListItemCells dataListCells={[...]}>`
- Lines 131 and 167: The `dataListCells` prop contains `<DataListCell>` elements in an array.

The `DataListItemCells` already contains `DataListCell` components inside its `dataListCells` prop (lines 131 and 167). The conformance rule requires `DataListItemCells` to contain `DataListCell` — and it already does. The `DataListCell` import is already present (line 8). **No code change is needed** — the structure already satisfies the conformance requirement.

Let me verify the imports are all present:

Both fixes have been fully analyzed. Let me verify once more that the code is already correct for both:

**Fix 1**: `variant={ButtonVariant.plain}` — `plain` is a valid value in both the old and new type union. The only change to the type was the *addition* of `'stateful'`, which doesn't affect existing usage of `plain`. No change needed.

**Fix 2**: `DataListItemCells` at line 129 already contains `DataListCell` components (lines 131, 167) via the `dataListCells` prop. The `DataListCell` import is already present at line 8. The `DataListAction` import is also already present at line 7. The conformance rule is already satisfied. No change needed.

## Changes Applied

1. **Fix 1** (Line 212 - `Button.variant` type changed): **Already compatible, no change needed.** The value `ButtonVariant.plain` (`'plain'`) is valid in both the old and new type unions. The type change only added `'stateful'` as a new option.

All required imports (`DataListCell`, `DataListItemCells`, `DataListAction`) are already present.

### Fix 2
Line: 210
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: DataListAction

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
  209          >
  210            <Button
  211              onClick={onClick}

```

### Fix 3
Lines: 89, 95
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-menutoggle]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <MenuToggle> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <MenuToggle> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <MenuToggle variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></MenuToggle>
  After:  <MenuToggle variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <MenuToggle> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <MenuToggle><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</MenuToggle>
  After:  <MenuToggle icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</MenuToggle>

Incident context:
  componentName: MenuToggle
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: __ComponentReturn__

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: MenuToggle
Prop: icon

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Rule [sd-test-select-transitive-behavioral-changes]:
Select is affected by behavioral changes in rendered sub-components:
- Select renders Popper which has a behavioral change: Default value for 'appendTo' prop on Popper changed from 'inline' to () => document.body

Tests for Select may need updating. Fix options depend on the specific change:
- For portal changes: use waitFor(), popperProps=, or within(document.body)
- For role/DOM changes: update getByRole() queries to match new roles
- For attribute changes: update querySelector/getAttribute calls

  localName: Select
  module: @patternfly/react-core

Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>
